findings.problem: Captcha API exposes plaintext expression, bypassing captcha control
findings.evidence: GET /api/auth/captcha returns expression; client can compute answer without OCR
findings.recommendation: Remove expression from API response; return only captchaId and imageBase64

findings.problem: Rate limits trust client X-Forwarded-For without trusted-proxy validation
findings.evidence: resolveClientIp() reads X-Forwarded-For for login/register throttling; attacker rotates header to bypass limits
findings.recommendation: Honor X-Forwarded-For only from configured trusted proxies

findings.problem: Chat image upload validates MIME only, not magic bytes
findings.evidence: uploadChatImage stores raw stream; validateChatImage checks Content-Type only vs avatar re-encode path
findings.recommendation: Route chat images through ImageUploadValidator.validateAndReencode()

findings.problem: SSE errors forward raw exception messages to clients
findings.evidence: resolveStreamErrorMessage returns e.getMessage() for non-BusinessException; sent in SSE error payload
findings.recommendation: Map to generic user message; log details server-side only

findings.problem: Web Push endpoints not validated for SSRF when push enabled
findings.evidence: upsertPushSubscription persists arbitrary endpoint; WebPushService POSTs to stored URL
findings.recommendation: Allowlist known push providers; block private/metadata IPs

findings.problem: API docs enabled by default without auth
findings.evidence: lianyu.api-docs.enabled defaults true; Sa-Token exempts /doc.html and /v3/api-docs/**
findings.recommendation: Default api-docs to false in production profiles

findings.problem: WebSocket STOMP allows wildcard origin by default
findings.evidence: ws.allowed-origin-patterns defaults to *; CSWSH risk if token leaked
findings.recommendation: Require explicit origin list in all deployed profiles

findings.problem: Vault decryption errors leak infrastructure details to users
findings.evidence: BusinessException message references LIANYU_MASTER_KEY and seed script path
findings.recommendation: Return generic AI configuration unavailable message

findings.problem: TTS failure logs full upstream response body
findings.evidence: log.warn includes full HTTP body on non-2xx from DashScope
findings.recommendation: Log status and truncated/redacted body only

findings.problem: SSE stream errors with partial content still persist assistant messages
findings.evidence: finishSseError calls onComplete with partial content and null error when tokens emitted before failure
findings.recommendation: Never save partial replies on stream error paths

findings.problem: Client/server diverge after failed SSE with partial tokens
findings.evidence: Frontend removes optimistic UI on error; backend may persist partial reply (CL-010)
findings.recommendation: Align persistence with client error handling or expose failed-turn flag

findings.problem: Turn interrupt not re-checked between multi-bubble inserts
findings.evidence: bubbleGapMs sleep loop persists stale bubbles after new turnId set
findings.recommendation: Re-check turnId before each insert/broadcast

findings.problem: Group WebSocket USER_MESSAGE events not handled on client
findings.evidence: Server broadcasts USER_MESSAGE; handleGroupEvent ignores type
findings.recommendation: Handle USER_MESSAGE with dedupe against optimistic entries

findings.problem: Memory dedup hash uses summary text not source_msg_ids per schema design
findings.evidence: computeMemoryHash hashes summary text; migration specifies SHA-256(sorted(source_msg_ids))
findings.recommendation: Hash sorted source message IDs for idempotent upsert

findings.problem: Concurrent memory summary tasks can create near-duplicate memories
findings.evidence: Every turn enqueues memory.summary with 2-8 consumers; overlapping tasks with paraphrased summaries
findings.recommendation: Per-conversation lock/debounce; dedupe on source message set

findings.problem: loadOrCreateState check-then-insert race without duplicate-key recovery
findings.evidence: Concurrent recordUserTurn can double-insert on uk_relationship_user_character
findings.recommendation: Mirror CharacterStateService duplicate-key catch pattern

findings.problem: Duplicate SINGLE conversations possible under concurrent create
findings.evidence: No unique index on (user_id, character_id, mode); parallel POST can both insert
findings.recommendation: Add unique index or advisory lock; return existing on conflict

findings.problem: Cold-open guard non-atomic; duplicate opening messages possible
findings.evidence: findLastMessage==null check then generate without lock
findings.recommendation: Redis SETNX lock per conversation for cold open

findings.problem: Group replies persist in completion order not roster order
findings.evidence: Parallel CompletableFuture per member; seq follows LLM completion speed
findings.recommendation: Serialize turns per round or document completion-order semantics

findings.problem: Redis seq fallback can assign colliding sequence numbers
findings.evidence: reserveSeqBlock returns safeCount when increment null; multiple inserts may get seq 1
findings.recommendation: Fail request if seq allocation fails; bootstrap from DB max(seq)+1

findings.problem: Concurrent session-summary merges can lose work (last-write-wins)
findings.evidence: @Async maybeMergeAsync with no per-conversation lock
findings.recommendation: Per-conversation Redis lock or CAS on summary version

findings.problem: Concurrent memory insert on identical hash can fail MQ consumer
findings.evidence: No DuplicateKeyException handler unlike CharacterStateService
findings.recommendation: Catch duplicate key, re-read, treat as SKIPPED

findings.problem: Background message polling swallows all errors silently
findings.evidence: pollCurrentConversationMessages catch { // ignore polling errors } with silent API
findings.recommendation: Log and show degraded-mode indicator after N failures

findings.problem: Notification store updates use silent API in empty catch blocks
findings.evidence: refreshUnreadCount/markAllRead etc. catch {} with no logging
findings.recommendation: Log failures; expose lastSyncError in store

findings.problem: WebSocket JSON parse failures silently dropped
findings.evidence: JSON.parse in catch {} for group and notification topics
findings.recommendation: Log parse errors with topic and truncated body

findings.problem: Unread badge refresh fails silently
findings.evidence: listNotifications silent:true in catch { // ignore }
findings.recommendation: Log failure; keep last-known-good counts

findings.problem: Desktop pet observe pipeline fails with zero logging
findings.evidence: catch (e) { // 静默失败 } with no console/log
findings.recommendation: Log at warn level with error message

findings.problem: All AI replies failing still sends TURN_COMPLETE success signal
findings.evidence: repliedCount==0 breaks loop then unconditionally TURN_COMPLETE
findings.recommendation: Send TURN_ERROR or include failure count when repliedCount==0

findings.problem: Inner space build failures return default with no log
findings.evidence: catch (RuntimeException ignored) return defaultSpace()
findings.recommendation: Log warn; return unavailable flag instead of fake default

findings.problem: Milvus insert failure leaves MySQL rows without vectors silently
findings.evidence: No warn when vecId null; may overwrite milvusVecId with null
findings.recommendation: Warn/error when vecId null; queue repair; never overwrite with null

findings.problem: MinIO errors indistinguishable from missing object
findings.evidence: objectExists catch returns false with no log; sync skips upload on outage
findings.recommendation: Tri-state result; log non-404 failures

findings.problem: Group chat partial load failure clears messages without notify
findings.evidence: catch clears groupMessages to [] with no toast
findings.recommendation: Show error toast; preserve existing messages

findings.problem: Load older messages errors swallowed locally
findings.evidence: bare catch { // ignore load errors }
findings.recommendation: Log error; reset pagination flags

findings.problem: Memory retrieval failure returns empty list; chat proceeds unaware
findings.evidence: catch returns List.of() after log.error
findings.recommendation: Propagate degraded flag to chat layer

findings.problem: Memory extraction JSON parse failure logged at debug only
findings.evidence: log.debug on parse failure; memories skipped in production
findings.recommendation: Upgrade to log.warn with conversation IDs

findings.problem: Corrupt auth session deleted with no log
findings.evidence: catch deletes file and returns null silently
findings.recommendation: Log decrypt/parse failure without token values

findings.problem: Milvus init failure logged but startup continues
findings.evidence: catch log.error only; no health flag or fail-fast
findings.recommendation: Fail readiness probe or explicit degraded mode

findings.problem: Memory list N+1 character lookups
findings.evidence: Up to 200 metas each selectById in stream
findings.recommendation: Batch-load character names by ID set

findings.problem: Conversation list loads all conversations without pagination
findings.evidence: Unbounded select for sidebar list
findings.recommendation: Paginate or cap list

findings.problem: SSE path does heavy sync work before first token
findings.evidence: DB writes, 32-msg history, memory/relationship/session assembly pre-stream
findings.recommendation: Defer non-critical writes; cache warm context

findings.problem: Group reply fan-out saturates AI bulkhead (16 concurrent)
findings.evidence: Up to 4 parallel chatBlocking per round x 2 rounds
findings.recommendation: Cap per-user group AI concurrency

findings.problem: Moments loads comments sequentially per post then polls all every 6s
findings.evidence: 20 posts = 200 comment req/min steady state
findings.recommendation: Batch comments endpoint; poll only expanded posts

findings.problem: Thread.sleep(bubbleGapMs) blocks group-chat pool threads
findings.evidence: 500ms sleep per bubble during broadcast
findings.recommendation: Use ScheduledExecutorService for non-blocking delays

findings.problem: Chat polls getMessages every 10s re-fetching 50 rows
findings.evidence: 6 req/min/conv on idle chat
findings.recommendation: Poll with sinceSeq/ETag; backoff when idle

findings.problem: Message list not virtualized; DOM grows unbounded
findings.evidence: v-for full timeline; loadOlder prepends 50 per scroll
findings.recommendation: Virtual scroller; cap in-memory window

findings.problem: messageTimeline recomputes O(n) on every stream token
findings.evidence: stripInnerThoughts per message; GSAP bounce during stream
findings.recommendation: Incremental append; debounce stream watcher

findings.problem: Emotion decay scans entire character_state table every 15min
findings.evidence: selectList(null) then per-row updateById
findings.recommendation: Query only non-default emotions past interval

findings.problem: Profile fact metas query unbounded on cache miss
findings.evidence: likeRight prefix selectList with no LIMIT
findings.recommendation: Add LIMIT or slot-index table

findings.problem: SSE streams use ForkJoinPool.commonPool(); Electron bundle monolithic
findings.evidence: runAsync blockLast competes with group tasks; inlineDynamicImports in vite
findings.recommendation: Dedicated executor for AI/SSE; restore route chunks if feasible

findings.problem: Auth register/login/idempotent flows untested
findings.evidence: No AuthServiceTest or AuthControllerTest
findings.recommendation: Add unit tests for register/login branches

findings.problem: Captcha verify/burn-after-read untested
findings.evidence: No CaptchaServiceTest
findings.recommendation: Test valid/replay/expired/malformed captcha

findings.problem: Zero frontend tests for auth/SSE client
findings.evidence: vitest --passWithNoTests; 0 spec files
findings.recommendation: Add Vitest for secureToken and SSE parser

findings.problem: SSE send path and post-stream persistence untested
findings.evidence: No sendMessageStream/chatStream tests
findings.recommendation: Mock stream callback success/failure paths

findings.problem: Group interrupt/mention routing untested
findings.evidence: No GroupChatServiceTest
findings.recommendation: Test turn interrupt and mention filter

findings.problem: Memory detail ownership filter untested
findings.evidence: filterMessagesOwnedByUser has no tests
findings.recommendation: Test cross-user source message filtering

findings.problem: Rate limiting untested
findings.evidence: No AuthRateLimiterTest
findings.recommendation: Mock Redis; assert 429 at threshold

findings.problem: Memory upsert/dedup pipeline untested
findings.evidence: MemoryWriterRelationshipTest does not cover processSummary
findings.recommendation: Test CREATED/UPDATED/SKIPPED paths

findings.problem: No HTTP/API-layer tests for critical endpoints
findings.evidence: Zero @WebMvcTest/@SpringBootTest
findings.recommendation: Add @WebMvcTest slices for auth/conversation/memory

findings.problem: SSE error contract untested
findings.evidence: shouldSkipJsonErrorBody has no tests
findings.recommendation: Unit-test SSE skip matrix

findings.problem: Assistant relationship heuristics untested end-to-end
findings.evidence: recordAssistantTurn not directly verified
findings.recommendation: Test ASSISTANT_VULNERABLE_REPLY detection

findings.problem: formatForPrompt with Redis state untested
findings.evidence: maybeMergeAsync untested
findings.recommendation: Test non-empty Redis summary formatting

findings.problem: Duplicate natural-style rules via PromptRuleEngine and buildNaturalStyleBlock
findings.evidence: Overlapping inner-thought rules appended twice
findings.recommendation: Single source of truth in PromptRuleEngine

findings.problem: Dead buildOutputLanguageBlock() duplicates OutputLanguageRuleHook
findings.evidence: Method never called repo-wide
findings.recommendation: Remove unused method

findings.problem: Identical pack()/tags() copied in six catalog files
findings.evidence: Same 8-line helpers per franchise file
findings.recommendation: Shared helper on CharacterSquareCatalog

findings.problem: slugForSortOrder switch duplicates BY_SLUG keys
findings.evidence: 50+ case switch mirrors map.put slugs
findings.recommendation: Derive sort order from registration metadata

findings.problem: Six handlers repeat SSE skip guard boilerplate
findings.evidence: shouldSkipJsonErrorBody duplicated per handler
findings.recommendation: Extract shared wrapper helper

findings.problem: 401 handling duplicated in success and error interceptors
findings.evidence: Identical clearToken/redirect block twice
findings.recommendation: Extract handleUnauthorizedSession()

findings.problem: parseMessageTime/formatTimeDivider duplicated
findings.evidence: Byte-for-byte identical helpers
findings.recommendation: Shared chatTimeline util

findings.problem: Character display-name fallback scattered inconsistently
findings.evidence: 8+ repeated ternaries with different defaults
findings.recommendation: Centralize CharacterDisplayNames helper

findings.problem: Mixed inline vs franchise-file catalog registration
findings.evidence: First 7 slugs inline; rest delegated to *Catalog*.java
findings.recommendation: Unify registration pattern

findings.problem: Partial duplication of message timeline assembly
findings.evidence: Shared TIME_GAP_MS divider logic; ChatPage adds group flags
findings.recommendation: Extract shared timeline builder with options

findings.problem: Orphaned Vue component
findings.evidence: Zero imports repo-wide
findings.recommendation: Remove or wire into landing

findings.problem: Orphaned page
findings.evidence: Router redirects /encounter to /#cast; never loaded
findings.recommendation: Remove page

findings.problem: Unused ENCOUNTER_ROLES export
findings.evidence: Only consumer is orphaned EncounterPage
findings.recommendation: Remove with orphaned page

findings.problem: Dead deprecated applyAccentColor export
findings.evidence: No callers; applyTheme used instead
findings.recommendation: Remove export

findings.problem: Dead deprecated resetAccentColor alias
findings.evidence: UI uses resetTheme only
findings.recommendation: Remove alias

findings.problem: Dead sanitizeSettingsForResponse method
findings.evidence: Production uses normalizeSettings
findings.recommendation: Remove deprecated wrapper

findings.problem: Unused sanitizeTextToHtml export
findings.evidence: Only sanitizeHtml imported
findings.recommendation: Remove unused export

findings.problem: Unused devDependency sharp
findings.evidence: Icon pipeline uses Python PIL not Node sharp
findings.recommendation: Remove from devDependencies

findings.problem: Unused devDependency png-to-ico
findings.evidence: No script imports; PIL handles ICO
findings.recommendation: Remove from devDependencies

findings.problem: Unused devDependency @vue/test-utils
findings.evidence: Zero test files in frontend
findings.recommendation: Remove until component tests added
